LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LEGALMATCH'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED IN PART AND GRANTED IN PART. THE MOTION TO STRIKE IS DENIED AS TO PARAGRAPHS 16 AND 19 OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT BECAUSE THESE PARAGRAPHS ARE SUPPORTED BY EXHIBIT A OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE MOTION TO STRIKE IS GRANTED, WITHOUT OPPOSITION, AS TO PARAGRAPHS 15 AND 18 OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, WHICH SEEK ATTORNEY FEES. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LEGALMATCH'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. ON ITS FACE, THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT DOES NOT SHOW THAT THE BREACH OF CONTRACT CAUSE OF ACTION IS TIME-BARRED. SEE E-FAB, INC. V. ACCOUNTANTS, INC. SVCS. (2007) 153 CAL.APP.4TH 1308, 1315-16. DEFENDANT RAISES FACTUAL ISSUES THAT CANNOT BE CONSIDERED ON DEMURRER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-29-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2014 Set For Trial On Feb-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Continued To Jul-23-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-09-2014 Continued To Jun-24-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Ronald K. Losch, Esq. of Losch & Ehrlich, Tel. 415.956.8400, for plaintiff and opposing party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT LEGALMATCH'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled. On its face, the First Amended Complaint does not show that the breach of contract cause of action is time-barred. See E-Fab, Inc. v. Accountants, Inc. Svcs. (2007) 153 Cal.App.4th 1308, 1315-16. Defendant raises factual issues that cannot be considered on demurrer. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT LEGALMATCH'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied in part and granted in part. The motion to strike is denied as to paragraphs 16 and 19 of the First Amended Complaint because these paragraphs are supported by Exhibit A of the First Amended Complaint. The motion to strike is granted, without opposition, as to paragraphs 15 and 18 of the First Amended Complaint, which seek attorney fees. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2014 Continued To May-13-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-11-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2013 Continued To Jan-22-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
